sections.title: What is AgentDoom?
sections.content: AgentDoom is a platform that transforms natural language into fully deployed web tools. Just describe what you need and we build it instantly.

sections.title: How much does it cost?
sections.content: We offer a free tier for personal use with up to 5 tools. Pro plans start at $19/month for unlimited tools and custom domains.

sections.title: Is my data secure?
sections.content: Yes. All data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We are SOC 2 compliant and never share your data with third parties.

sections.title: How do I get support?
sections.content: Reach us via in-app chat, email at support@agentdoom.com, or our community Discord. Pro users get priority response within 2 hours.
